feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Custom CDS-View: I_MfgOrderOperationWithStatus as a external API not working
entry.content:
Hello,
I have a question on the key user extensibility / Custom CDS-Views of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

To consume Information of Manufacturing Order Operations, we would like to generate an external API via Custom CDS-View Structure on the Data source: I_MfgOrderOperationWithStatus. When we consume the API (in Excel for example) the following runtime Error appears: 

When we select just the top ten results of the query, its working. But when we want to get more results, like 100 or 1000 the runtime error appears. Does anyone know what the problem could be?

Here I have some additional Information:
When I select the SAP View I_MfgOrderOperationWithStatus as the Main Data Source in the custom CDS-View the following Log Detail is shown:

Does this mean that we cannot use this data source in an external API scenario? And if it is, can you already see it somewhere in the view-browser on the data source descriptions? 

Thanks a lot for your help!
Best Regards

entry.title: Single Sign On
entry.content: How will it work in public cloud for single sign on function? Any setting to be adopted in CBC to enable SSO?

entry.title: How to create new fields for journal entries mass upload in public cloud?
entry.content: How to create new fields (e.g. customized fields, long text) in the upload template for journal entries mass upload? How to add validation rules and substitution rules for JE mass upload?

entry.title: Issue Associating Supplier View in CBO for BP in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hello,

I am currently facing an issue in the S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition while creating a Custom Business Object (CBO) for a Business Partner (BP). The problem arises when I attempt to associate the Business Object Supplier; it appears that the view does not exist.

I have also tried creating a CDS view to resolve this issue, but unfortunately, it did not work. How can I associtate a value help for my Business Partner field in my CBO please?

Thank you in advance for your assistance.

Best regards,

Flávio Fujita

entry.title: PO Output Control Public Cloud compare to S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi,

I hope you all doing well.

I have a question, how do you deal with message control in purchase orders in Public Cloud compare to S/4Hana?

In Public Cloud purchase order edit view - you do not have icons to edit/copy... output message positions in print preview anymore.

In S/4Hana ME22N messages, you have these to edit manually

A key user demands to act like in previous GUI and wish to edit a purchase order afterwards and delete the message position manually to not inform the supplier of changes. I know that in the Configuration there is the setting " Fields Relevant to Printouts of Changes", but he wants to do so in the app as well. How is the explaination not to have the flexibility anymore?

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics Cloud: Grouping DATE values by MONTH from linked dimensions in charts
entry.content:
Hello SAP community,

I have a question about the capabilities of SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics Cloud to group DATE values from two linked data sources (linked dimensions) by MONTH (while also showing unbooked values) in a chart.

So for example, let's say I have the creation dates and EUR values of sales quotations (AG) and a sales orders (TA) in two separate Custom Analytical Queries. 

(I know you can usually get this data from a single CDS view, but for the sake of example, let's say you have two data sources).

 

This would be my sample input data:

And this is the kind of chart that I want to create in with SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics Cloud:

This is what I am currently able to create. It is close, but it still lacks the grouping by month:

The creation date dimensions are linked for sales quotation and sales order, and unbooked data is displayed:

 

Unfortunately, when I try to group dates by month/year, I get the error "Failed to fetch data".

 

I guess the grouping can usually be done by changing the hierarchy from "flat presentation" to "year-month-day" and then setting the level to month. 

But something about having linked date dimensions seems to interfere.

Is there a way to make this work?

 

Thanks in advance.

 

Best Regards,

Simon

entry.title: 'Manage Customer Line Items'
entry.content:
I want to retrieve the contents of the 'Manage Customer Line Items' application.
Which API should I use and which feature should I add in the Communication Arrangements?

entry.title: Transport migration cockpit project and objects in S4 Hana public cloud.
entry.content:
Hello Team,

How to transport migration cockpit project and objects from Dev to Qas in S4 Hana public cloud.

Thanks

entry.title: 财务凭证打印
entry.content: hello，工程师，想咨询一下目前在ES版本中，使用APP-科目凭证输出（中国）时，如何打印出A5格式的会计凭证

entry.title: sap blogs
entry.content: Is there an Audit trail available in SAP where I can see the changes made to Bill Plan dates and amounts in Customer Projects? This relates to Professional Services.

entry.title: Workflow triggering based on custom fields in sales order item level
entry.content:
I have created a custom field "Status" in sales order item field in public cloud . I have given three dropdowns , "F" , "P" and "N" in custom field .Based on the certain selected value("F") in the dropdown I have to send the notification to approver (trigger the workflow) . 

I have used the BADI " SWF_WORKFLOW_CONDITION_DEF " to get new dropdown in the manage sales document workflow pre condition and I have used  "SWF_WORKFLOW_CONDITION_EVAL" for the value . I'm not able to trigger the workflow.

Is it possible to trigger the workflow using certain data of the custom field? 

Please help me with this .

Thanks & Regards

Shraddha Nayak

entry.title: SAP_COM_0008
entry.content: "I'd like to ask, why don't I see the option 'SAP_COM_0008' in the drop down menu when creating a New Communication Arrangement?"

entry.title: Business partner screening is not available in Manage Business Partner Master Data
entry.content:
The new field 'Screening Status' is available in the Maintain Business Partner app, but it's not available in the Manage Business Partner Master Data app ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Get the list of "Capital Amount" for supplier
entry.content:
How to get the list of "Capital Amount" for suppliers ?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to update the status of an eDocument?
entry.content: We have incoming eDocuments coming into our eDocument cockpit on S/4HANA Public Cloud edition. However, we do not want to process these documents because we will send these documents via available API to an external system. Since, we will not be posting this document inside S/4HANA, is there a way we can change the status of this document in eDocument cockpit? Not manually but is there a way to automate the change of status, either via API or BAPI or something else.

entry.title: How to link ship-to to an already loaded business partner?
entry.content:
Is there a specific migration file provided by SAP that we could use to link the ship-to to an already loaded business partner ?
 Can the same migration file (customer one) be used to add an additional ship-to partner function to an already loaded business partner ? If so, what the sequence should be ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Standard CDS view as app
entry.content:
Hi,

In public cloud, what is the easiest way to show a stanard CDS view as an app?

I basically want to provide our users the same functionality as the customer data browser app, without giving them access to this app. (and only for a single CDS view)

Best regards,

Kristian

entry.title: Data migration - Automatic mapping in "Migrate your data" app SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

We are currently working on data migration for our customer and we wondered if it is possible to do automatic mapping in the "Migrate your data" app between legacy data and SAP data?

Example: For Purchasing info record migration, the Business Partner Supplier SAP ID is needed in the migration file. Is it possible to perform an automatic mapping of legacy Supplier ID and SAP BP Supplier ID via the Mapping tasks of "Migrate your data" app?

We would like to avoid data mapping errors.

Thank you for you help.

Regards,

Nelly

entry.title: Duplicate Purchase Requisitions
entry.content:
There is a issue. The material has MRP type VB, Reorder point 1, Lot-sizing procedure HB and Maximum stock level 1.

I have run MRP run today and a purchase requisition created with qty 1 with fixed id.

The purchase requisition has been approved and converted into purchase order with qty 1.

The next day after MRP run, there is one more purchase requisition created with qty 1 and md04 available stock showing 2 with both items, which is exceeding maximum stock level.\

Where is the issue?

entry.title: Sales order workflow value help in S4 Hana Public cloud.
entry.content:
What will be the service_path , entity and property for the field(Overall Status) of Sales order to implement the workflow value help badi.

ct_parameter = VALUE #( (

id = 'id_status'

  name = 'Overall Status'

xsd_type = if_swf_flex_ifs_condition_def=>cs_xstype-string

  service_path = ?

  entity = ?

  property = ?

mandatory = abap_true )

Thanks & Regards

Shraddha
